title: Spinner component with configurable size and label
purpose: Provides a reusable animated spinner UI element that can be customized with size, label, and styling options.
module_context: Exports a Spinner component with predefined size classes and a display name. The component accepts props for size, label, and additional CSS classes.

steps.content: Render a container div with flex layout and gap spacing.
Apply animation and color classes to the SVG spinner element.
Set the SVG viewBox and stroke properties for the spinner animation.
Conditionally render a label text element if provided.
Include screen reader text with the label or default 'Loading...' message.
